chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-930 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah 1. For orders on M.A. No.4282/2022. 2. For orders on office objections appearing on reverse of memo of petition. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4283/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 05.04.2022 Mr. Hyder Ali Shoro, Advocate for petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for directions against the respondents to pay him compensation for the subject land which as per him has been acquired by them for United Energy Pakistan Limited. As per learned counsel for the petitioner the subject land was allotted to the father of the petitioner and he died prior to finalization of such allotment. However the possession of the subject land was taken by the respondents from the petitioner. If it is believed to be so, then the title of the petitioner over subject land is not perfect which may justify him to make claim of the compensation under land Acquisition Act without having a recourse before Civil/Revenue Courts for finalization of title over the subject land. The directions sought for as such could not be issued by this Court in exercise of its writ jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine along-with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
